ddls:
CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the document */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the document was published */,
  "type" INTEGER /* Type of document (e.g., Submissions and Reports) */,
  "category" INTEGER /* Category of the document (e.g., UN Convention and Children's Rights) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the document */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the document (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Physical path of the document file */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for the document */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last modified date of the document */,
  "ownership" TEXT /* Ownership of the document (e.g., internal, external) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES document_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the document type (e.g., Submissions and Reports) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the document type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the document type is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., UN Convention and Children's Rights) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is active */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category for hierarchical categories */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the author (e.g., staff member, partner, stakeholder) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the author is active */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the author belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_authors" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "contribution_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of contribution by the author */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicates if the author is the primary author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id", "author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., staff member, partner, stakeholder) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the user */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has administrative privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the document */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the document */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser, device) used to access the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)
